title: carum minutum
intro: Carum minutum, also known as Carum carvi var. minus or small caraway, is a plant species belonging to the parsley family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which have been used in traditional medicine to aid digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Carum minutum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Carum minutum can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
